description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a solid 3D model of the cranium that represents the total cranial volume, including the bone and internal brain cavity, while excluding external soft tissues. Export the resulting 3D surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/solid_cranium.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
